text: [TEL]: Due to a train fault, there will be no train service between Gardens By The Bay to Bayshore. Train service is available between Woodlands North to Gardens By The Bay. Free Regular Bus available between Gardens By The Bay to Bayshore.

text.en-SG: Due to a train fault, there will be no train service between Gardens By The Bay and Bayshore. Train service is available between Woodlands North and Gardens By The Bay. A Free Regular Bus is available between Gardens By The Bay and Bayshore.
text.zh-Hans: 由于列车故障，Gardens By The Bay与Bayshore之间将无法提供列车服务。Woodlands North与Gardens By The Bay之间有列车服务。Gardens By The Bay至Bayshore有免费常规公交。
text.ms: Disebabkan kerosakan kereta api, tiada perkhidmatan tren antara Gardens By The Bay dan Bayshore. Perkhidmatan tren tersedia antara Woodlands North dan Gardens By The Bay. Bas Reguler Percuma tersedia antara Gardens By The Bay dan Bayshore.
text.ta: ட்ரெயின் கோளளை காரணமாக Gardens By The Bay மற்றும் Bayshore இடையில் ரயில் சேவை காணாது. Woodlands North இருந்து Gardens By The Bay இடை ரயில் சேவை உள்ளது. Gardens By The Bay இருந்து Bayshore வரை இலவச விதமான பேருந்து உள்ளது.

text: [TEL]: Train service available between Woodlands North to Bayshore. Free Regular Bus ceased between Gardens By The Bay to Bayshore. We apologise for the inconvenience.

text.en-SG: Train service available between Woodlands North to Bayshore. Free Regular Bus ceased between Gardens By The Bay to Bayshore. We apologise for the inconvenience.
text.zh-Hans: 列车服务在 Woodlands North 至 Bayshore 之间恢复。 Gardens By The Bay 至 Bayshore 之间的免费常规巴士已停止。对给您带来的不便，我们表示歉意。
text.ms: Perkhidmatan tren tersedia antara Woodlands North hingga Bayshore. Bas Percuma Reguler dihentikan antara Gardens By The Bay hingga Bayshore. Kami memohon maaf atas kesulitan ini.
text.ta: Woodlands North இருந்து Bayshore வரை ரயில் சேவை உள்ளது. Gardens By The Bay இருந்து Bayshore வரை இலவச வழக்கம் பொது பேருந்து நிறுத்தப்பட்டுள்ளது. நேர்ந்த அதிருப்திக்கு மன்னிக்கவும்.
